2605.02943.title: Healthcare AI GYM for Medical Agents
2605.02943.paper_summary: Clinical reasoning demands multi-step interactions -- gathering patient history, ordering tests, interpreting results, and making safe treatment decisions -- yet a unified training environment provides the breadth of clinical domains and specialized tools to train generalizable medical AI agents through reinforcement learning remains elusive. We present a comprehensive empirical study of multi-turn agentic RL for medical AI, built on \gym{}, a gymnasium-compatible environment spanning 10 clinical domains with 3.6K+ tasks, 135 domain-specific tools, and a knowledge base of 828K medical passages. Our analysis reveals that agentic multi-turn structure degrades into verbose single-turn monologues, characterized by monotonic length explosion and a simultaneous erosion of tool-use frequency. We characterize how this collapse, alongside distillation instability, stems from the misalignment of sparse terminal rewards with sequential clinical trajectories. We find that vanilla GRPO achieves strong final accuracy on some benchmarks but suffers from training instability, evidenced by significant oscillations in response length and prolonged convergence periods. To improve training efficiency and stability, we propose Turn-level Truncated On-Policy Distillation (TT-OPD), a self-distillation framework where a gradient-free EMA teacher leverages outcome-privileged information to provide dense, outcome-aware KL regularization at every conversation turn. TT-OPD achieves the best performance on 10 of 18 benchmarks with an average +3.9~pp improvement over the non-RL baseline with faster early convergence, controlled response length, and sustained multi-turn tool use.
2605.02943.paper_summary_zh: 臨床推理需要多步驟的互動——收集病歷、訂購檢查、解釋結果以及做出安全的治療決策——然而，統一的訓練環境提供了臨床領域的廣度和專門工具，以通過強化學習訓練可泛化的醫療 AI 代理仍然難以實現。<lb/>我們提出了一項關於醫療 AI 的多回合代理強化學習的全面實證研究，建立在 \gym{} 上，這是一個兼容健身房的環境，涵蓋 10 個臨床領域，擁有 3.6K+ 任務、135 個特定領域的工具和 828K 醫學段落的知識庫。<lb/>我們的分析顯示，代理的多回合結構退化為冗長的單回合獨白，特徵是單調的長度爆炸和工具使用頻率的同時下降。<lb/>我們描述了這種崩潰以及蒸餾不穩定性是如何源於稀疏終端獎勵與連續臨床軌跡的不對齊。<lb/>我們發現，普通的 GRPO 在某些基準上達到了強大的最終準確性，但卻遭受訓練不穩定性，這在回應長度的顯著波動和延長的收斂期中得到了證實。<lb/>為了提高訓練效率和穩定性，我們提出了回合級截斷在線蒸餾 (TT-OPD)，這是一種自我蒸餾框架，其中無梯度的 EMA 教師利用結果特權信息在每次對話回合中提供密集的、結果感知的 KL 正則化。<lb/>TT-OPD 在 18 個基準中的 10 個上達到了最佳性能，平均提高了 +3.9~pp，相較於非強化學習基準具有更快的早期收斂、可控的回應長度和持續的多回合工具使用。
2605.02943.author: Minbyul Jeong et.al.
